description_long: This is a round, metal manhole cover featuring a vibrant, intricate design. The surface is adorned with a stylized depiction of a traditional Japanese castle, surrounded by blooming cherry blossoms in shades of pink and magenta. The background is filled with swirling blue and teal patterns, giving the cover a decorative and cultural appearance. The edges show signs of wear and weathering, with patches of rust and discoloration, indicating long-term outdoor use. The cover appears solid and heavy, typical of cast iron construction, and is flush with the ground. There are no visible handles, bolts, or fasteners on the surface, and some small inscriptions or markings are present along the edge.
description: A round, weathered metal manhole cover with a colorful Japanese castle and cherry blossom design, accented by blue and teal patterns.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the central castle motif and the surrounding cherry blossoms, with the most vibrant colors and clear pattern details visible.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the right side of the cover, showing more of the swirling blue patterns and edge inscriptions.
description_view_2: The left side of the cover is more prominent, with the cherry blossoms and part of the castle visible, as well as some edge wear.
description_view_3: This angle focuses on the top of the castle and the upper cherry blossoms, with the blue background patterns more pronounced.
attribute_pattern_design: Intricate, colorful pattern featuring a Japanese castle at the center, surrounded by stylized cherry blossoms and swirling blue and teal motifs, with some edge inscriptions.
